title: libssh security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[0.10.4-15]
- Bump spec to make the 9.7 NVR higher than the 9.6 one

[0.10.4-14]
- Fix CVE-2025-5318
  Resolves: RHEL-111732
full_text:
[0.10.4-15]
- Bump spec to make the 9.7 NVR higher than the 9.6 one

[0.10.4-14]
- Fix CVE-2025-5318
  Resolves: RHEL-111732
